event.title: New robotics deployment milestone
event.whyItMatters: The deployment has enough operational detail to justify a short explanatory thread.

images.alt: A robot operating in a production facility.
images.caption: The deployment environment described in the official note.

candidates.label: Deployment breakdown
candidates.translation:
1/3 机器人里程碑真正重要的时刻，是它从演示变成可重复运行的流程。这次部署终于提供了可供判断的细节。

2/3 限制仍然是人工监督，以及与现有系统的集成。硬件进步本身并不会消除运营工作。

3/3 下一项值得观察的信号不是另一段视频，而是在第二个客户处，以类似的正常运行时间和人员需求完成重复部署。
posts: A robotics milestone matters more when it moves from a demo to a repeatable operating process. This deployment finally gives us details to judge.
The constraint is still human supervision and integration with existing systems. Hardware progress alone does not remove the operational work.
The next signal to watch is not another video. It is repeat deployment at a second customer with similar uptime and staffing requirements.
